stemHtml: The pilot-in-command of an aircraft subjected to unlawful interference, which must depart from its assigned track or flight level without being able to contact ATS, should whenever possible…

options.a: change the transponder code to the present code plus 5.
options.b: fly at the corresponding IFR flight level plus or minus 200 ft.
options.c: attempt to broadcast warnings on the frequency in use, or on the emergency frequency.
options.d: once established on the new track, change the track every 5 minutes by 5 degrees.
